subject: FW: Nadia
body:
Jeffrey,
 
See below as I totally freaked out after your phone call.  I was in a
conference call regarding an accounting issue and wanted to see her after
the booking staff.  I love her hair cut now.  Evidently, she is to call Pink
in the morning.  I called your office as he did not take her cell number and
I wanted to speak with her as well.  Please see below as I flew off the
handle after your call.  I was looking back in my files on some old
correspondence and found this address as I tried to call you back at your
office.  I was not sure if this email was still working.  Of course, I love
all of your referrals you send us and we would be anxious to finally work
with Nadia especially with that haircut which should get her alot of
attention by clients.
 
Kind Regards,
 
Jeff Fuller
 
 

 

Jeff

Obviously Nadia took what I said out of context. I was trying to impress
upon her the fact if we were going to do

A major relaunch on her, that she would need to take it very seriously, as
we would be. I meant no disrespect to Nadia or to Mr. Epstein. I know he is
very close with Jean Luc and you;and I would never intentionally say
anything to harm that relationship. I wanted her to leave the agency with
the feeling that we were excited to get her career going again and wanted
her to share in that excitement.

 

I think Nadia is very marketable and was looking forward to working with
her. I hope I haven't screwed that up.

If she took my enthusiasm for rudeness, I feel horrible. I was trying to get
her excited about coming back.

 

 

Again, my deepest apology

 

pink
body_html:
Jeffrey,
 
See below as I totally freaked out after your phone call.  I was in a conference call regarding an accounting issue and wanted to see her after the booking staff.  I love her hair cut now.  Evidently, she is to call Pink in the morning.  I called your office as he did not take her cell number and I wanted to speak with her as well.  Please see below as I flew off the handle after your call.  I was looking back in my files on some old correspondence and found this address as I tried to call you back at your office.  I was not sure if this email was still working.  Of course, I love all of your referrals you send us and we would be anxious to finally work with Nadia especially with that haircut which should get her alot of attention by clients.
 
Kind Regards,
 
Jeff Fuller
 
 

 

Jeff

Obviously Nadia took what I said out of context. I was trying to impress upon her the fact if we were going to do

A major relaunch on her, that she would need to take it very seriously, as we would be. I meant no disrespect to Nadia or to Mr. Epstein. I know he is very close with Jean Luc and you;and I would never intentionally say anything to harm that relationship. I wanted her to leave the agency with the feeling that we were excited to get her career going again and wanted her to share in that excitement.

 

I think Nadia is very marketable and was looking forward to working with her. I hope I haven’t screwed that up.

If she took my enthusiasm for rudeness, I feel horrible. I was trying to get her excited about coming back.

 

 

Again, my deepest apology

 

pink
